note: file_replace has no settings form or config objects, so its behavior is documented via response-graded `recipe` cases probing the replace route/permission, the same-URI guarantee, the invited hook, the extension constraint, the Views field, and the image-style flush.

evals.prompt: What is the point of the File Replace module — what does it preserve when you swap a file's contents on a Drupal 11 site?
evals.expected_output: It overwrites an existing managed file's contents with a new upload while keeping the file URI, filename, and file entity ID unchanged, so existing links, embeds, and references keep working.

evals.prompt: What is the URL/route to replace a file with File Replace, and which permission does a user need to reach it?
evals.expected_output: Replace form at /admin/content/files/replace/{file} (route entity.file.replace_form), gated by the `replace files` permission.

evals.prompt: A user has the 'replace files' permission but still cannot replace a particular file with File Replace. What extra condition must the file meet?
evals.expected_output: The custom access check also requires the file to be permanent (isPermanent()); temporary/unmanaged files cannot be replaced even with the permission.

evals.prompt: When replacing a file through File Replace's form, what constraint is enforced on the uploaded replacement file?
evals.expected_output: The replacement upload is validated to have the same file extension as the original (FileExtension upload validator); the accept attribute also hints the original MIME type.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal module I want to run custom code (e.g. purge a CDN) every time a file is replaced via File Replace. Which hook do I implement? Name it and its argument.
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_file_replace(\Drupal\file\FileInterface $file) — invoked after the file's contents are overwritten and the entity re-saved.

evals.prompt: I built a View of files (file_managed) on my Drupal site. How do I add a link that lets editors replace each file using File Replace?
evals.expected_output: Add the Views field 'Link to replace file' (id file_replace_link) to the View; it renders a link (default text 'replace') to the replace form.

evals.prompt: After I replace an image with File Replace, do the existing image-style thumbnails update automatically, and why?
evals.expected_output: Yes — the module's own hook_file_replace flushes all image-style derivatives for the file's URI (when the image module is enabled), so thumbnails regenerate from the new content.
